title: Anupama
writer: Rajinder Singh Bedi, Bimal Dutta, D.N. Mukherjee
plot: Mohan Sharma (Tarun Bose) is a workaholic whose life changes dramatically after his wife dies giving birth to their daughter Uma (Sharmila Tagore). He despises the daughter by day, and adores her when drunk at night. Uma's life ge...
